name: developer-relations
description: Developer-relations (DevRel) team — 2 agents (devrel-strategist, developer-advocate) for growing and serving a developer audience: the developer funnel (awareness → activation → advocacy) and the metrics that track it (time-to-first-success, activation rate — not GitHub stars), developer marketing that teaches not sells, sample apps and demos that run as shipped, conference talks + CFP abstracts, and developer-community programs. 5 skills, a 4-doc knowledge bank (Mermaid trees for the DevRel funnel/metrics and content-format/channel selection; a DX/onboarding guide; dated tooling tiers), 7 best-practices, 4 templates, 4 commands, 1 advisory hook (vanity-metric / market-at-developers / placeholder-secret smells), a scenarios bank. Advisory — no MCP/LSP/bin. Seams with technical-writing-docs (the docs artifact), api-engineering (the contract), product-management (what to build), marketing-operations (the non-dev funnel). Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
